name: EB OE TS.Z./SUEDZUCKER
summary: EB OE TS.Z./SUEDZUCKER is a tracker certificate linked to Südzucker AG, a German sugar producer. The company is one of the largest sugar producers in the world and also operates in the segments of special products, CropEnergies and fruit. The certificate allows investors to participate in the performance of Südzucker's stock.
